pi_items.source: Task description implicitly details a role as an infrastructure engineering firm analyst building a data center.
Task description and site_selection_brief.txt both mention hyperscale data center construction.
setup_task.sh explicitly checks for and uses this file path, which install_panoply.sh downloads.
Inspection of air.mon.ltm.nc file attributes and variables via python netCDF4 module confirms the target variable is named 'air'.
setup_task.sh creates this directory, and export_result.sh checks for files within it.
export_result.sh explicitly searches for these exact three files.
Analysis of the air.mon.ltm.nc dataset shows that among Ireland, Denmark, Iceland, and Netherlands, only Iceland has a July temperature (~10.0°C) remaining below the 15°C threshold.
Task description and site_selection_brief.txt both explicitly set the maximum ambient temperature to 15°C.
site_selection_brief.txt sets the 15°C equivalent to 288.15 Kelvin.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must analyze the actual NCEP Reanalysis air.mon.ltm.nc dataset using NASA Panoply to select a hyperscale data center site. According to the dataset, only Iceland meets the explicit threshold of remaining below 15°C (288.15 K) in July. The exported files must be exactly named europe_july_temp.png, europe_jan_temp.png, and site_selection_report.txt and saved in /home/ga/Documents/DataCenter.
